20 years of operation, Community Web Service is entering a new chapter as part of 2A Marketing. Clients still receive the same practical, results-focused support. That work is now backed by a larger multidisciplinary team with greater capacity for bigger, more complex projects and for wholistic marketing and business development solutions.


A history of Community Web Service


    Community Web Service was founded as RGaines Web Development in 2006 to provide web development for small businesses in the greater Kansas City area and nearby rural communities. Over time, the work expanded into digital marketing, SEO, social media management, web accessibility and print design.



    Along the way, we served clients across the United States and around the world, including Europe and Africa. Our work supported political campaigns, industry leaders and small local non-profits alike.


What this means for clients and how to get in touch


    If you worked with Community Web Service in the past, you can expect the same relationship-focused approach, now backed by greater capacity and a broader range of services through 2A Marketing. LGCS is an education center with enriching programs running all daily for PresK through Elementary age children including Outdoor Elementary Clubhouse Enrichment and After-Care. LGCS believes that an integrated outdoor education program can meld traditional classroom pedagogy with the benefits of being more connected with nature. Children learn to be stewards of our environment while experiencing many lifelong health benefits of enjoying a healthy lifestyle and building strong motor skills. An outdoor education program allows for a hands-on approach to learning. Children can engage their whole bodies as they explore, learn, and problem solve. Basic to complex science and math concepts are easily grasped and children grow their expressive language and artistry skills by explaining the world around them.  At Long Grove Country School, we believe in developing the whole child to help young minds sprout and grow.
